response.justification: Bogdan has extensive full-stack experience across multiple languages and domains, with strong contributions to AI-agent infrastructure, testing frameworks, and cloud-native tooling — aligning well with the role’s technical scope. However, his resume spans over 25 years with many outdated or irrelevant roles, lacks clear evidence of recent Nest.js, Vitest, or React usage, and shows minimal focus on enterprise automation tooling — raising concerns about relevance and modern stack proficiency.
strengths: Deep full-stack experience with TypeScript, Node.js, and cloud platforms (AWS, Docker)
Proven involvement in AI-agent infrastructure and developer tooling (MCP code generators)
Strong testing culture with personal libraries (Fluent-Asserts, Trial) and workshop leadership
concerns: No clear evidence of recent Nest.js, Vitest, or React usage in current roles
Resume is overly long with many outdated roles (1990s–2000s) diluting modern relevance
Lacks explicit experience with enterprise internal automation tooling or Kotlin/Java backend services
